05-arachnophobia-turm.jpg.alt: Green-lit tower with barbed wire and warning signs, "Arachnophobia" lettering
05-arachnophobia-turm.jpg.caption: Arachnophobia. Not for anyone who balks at palm-sized spiders.

06-aquarium-fassade.jpg.alt: Derelict wooden building with "Aquarium" lettering, lit blue-green at night
06-aquarium-fassade.jpg.caption: Aquarium. Whatever swims out of that tank, it isn't friendly.

07-us-vs-you-eingang.jpg.alt: Lit wooden towers at the entrance to the "Us vs You" attraction at dusk
07-us-vs-you-eingang.jpg.caption: "Us vs You." Small spoiler: you're outnumbered.

17-tankwagen-ueberwuchert.jpg.alt: Old tanker truck completely overgrown with vines, daytime
17-tankwagen-ueberwuchert.jpg.caption: Nature reclaimed the tanker truck a long time ago.

18-roehrenfernseher-wand.jpg.alt: Wall of many old CRT televisions under a corrugated-iron roof
18-roehrenfernseher-wand.jpg.caption: A hundred TVs, one channel: nothing good.

19-can-you-handle-tuergriffe.jpg.alt: "Can you handle me" lettering made of old door handles and locks on a blue wall
19-can-you-handle-tuergriffe.jpg.caption: "Can you handle me" — spelled out in door handles. Honest answer: probably not.

20-ghostly-graveyard-schild.jpg.alt: Weathered "Ghostly Graveyard" sign on stone pillars among the trees
20-ghostly-graveyard-schild.jpg.caption: A graveyard with manners — at least it greets you before it starts.

21-halloween-breathless-fassade.jpg.alt: Blue art-deco facade with Halloween lettering and "Breathless" by day
21-halloween-breathless-fassade.jpg.caption: A pretty facade by day. Once it gets dark: have fun.

11-sphinx-pharao.jpg.alt: Shattered pharaoh statue lit up at night
11-sphinx-pharao.jpg.caption: Even the pharaohs look mean here.
